title: Immersing Pack
description:
Better UI, Better Performance, Quality Of Life Changes and More Content.
Made to Play on a Server for the Optimal Experience.
body:
# The Immersing Pack - currently being completely reworked (stay tuned!)

### The Immersing Pack is meant to be played with some additional mods on a server to unfold their full potential.
____________________________________________________________
**It is a modpack aiming to beautify many aspects of the game,
including**
- Advancement & Biome Announcements
- Reduced UI
- More and Better World & UI Sounds
- Better Visuals
- Smoother Animations
- The Ability to Zoom

**but also adding**
- a Completely Overhauled End
- Backpacks
- Various Treasure Items for Customization
- Many Vanilla-like Building Options

**and many more things to come...**

**_but most importantly:_**
### It's well optimized
____________________________________________________________
### Recommended Resourcepack:

[Patrix 32x](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/patrix-32x) (free version)


### Recommended Shaders:

[Photon](https://modrinth.com/shader/photon-shader) (when Distant Horizons _enabled)_

[Bliss](https://modrinth.com/shader/bliss-shader) (when Distant Horizons _disabled)_

_Both the Resourcepack and Shaders are included in the Modpack, but I recommend adding new Weapon Textures._
____________________________________________________________
<details>

[YUNG's API](https://modrinth.com/mod/yungs-api)

----------------------------
> The Modpack is currently only available in version 1.20.4, but is gonna be updated to 1.21 asap.
